columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The study explicitly states that eligible patients had 'de novo metastatic prostate adenocarcinoma' (page 1, Methods section, Chunk 5). 'De novo' refers to synchronous metastases. The Interpretation section further clarifies: 'Nonetheless, as PEACE-1 only included patients with de novo mCSPC, it is still unclear whether this triple therapy might benefit patients with metachronous mCSPC' (page 11, Chunk 5). This indicates that 100% of the patients in the study, across all treatment arms, had synchronous metastases.
columns.column_name_raw: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Treatment

columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Control
columns.extraction_plan: The study explicitly states that eligible patients had 'de novo metastatic prostate adenocarcinoma' (page 1, Methods section, Chunk 5). 'De novo' refers to synchronous metastases. The Interpretation section further clarifies: 'Nonetheless, as PEACE-1 only included patients with de novo mCSPC, it is still unclear whether this triple therapy might benefit patients with metachronous mCSPC' (page 11, Chunk 5). This indicates that 100% of the patients in the study, across all control arms, had synchronous metastases.
columns.column_name_raw: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Control

columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Metachronous | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The study explicitly states that it 'only included patients with de novo mCSPC' (page 11, Chunk 5). This implies that no patients with metachronous metastases were included in the study.
